<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Polyfill\Php85; /** * @author Pierre Ambroise <pierre27.ambroise@gmail.com> * * @internal */ final class Php85 { public static function get_error_handler(): ?callable { $handler = set_error_handler(null); restore_error_handler(); return $handler; } public static function get_exception_handler(): ?callable { $handler = set_exception_handler(null); restore_exception_handler(); return $handler; } public static function array_first(array $array) { foreach ($array as $value) { return $value; } return null; } public static function array_last(array $array) { return $array ? current(array_slice($array, -1)) : null; } }
